metadata.name: rkpc_conventional_radar_sid_exact_linework_audit
metadata.purpose: Gate exact runtime route approval for conventional/RADAR SID procedures that have text-derived or mathematically derived geometry but still need source chart linework cross-check before being presented as exact routes.
rules: Source text evidence can identify the intended route and page, but it does not validate chart-drawn linework.
Exact runtime route remains disabled until chart georeference, PDF vector/polyline extraction, and segment shape cross-checks are complete.
Training runtime paths may remain enabled only when explicitly marked training_runtime_path_allowed=true in derived geometry.
Candidate source chart linework may be used as reference overlay only; reference overlay geometry must not drive route queues or aircraft motion.

source_chart.chart_title: JEJU/Jeju Intl(RKPC) RWY 07 IPDAS 4K, MAKET 4K, TAMNA 2K, CJU 5K

source_text_evidence: Climb on R 067 YDM until D6.5, then turn Left to intercept R 013 CJU then proceed direct to IPDAS.
* Cross R 013 CJU/D30.0 at 7 000 ft and Cross IPDAS at 9 000 ft unless otherwise directed by ATC.

current_decision.reason: The route text, derived radial/DME points, page 3 route-line candidates, centerline candidates, SVG frame-tick based chart grid candidate, and linework reconciliation audit are recorded. The selected chart line is nearly parallel to CJU R013 but remains laterally offset from D30/IPDAS by about 8 NM, and the D6.5 cutpoint plus turn/intercept source shape are not reconciled. The procedure must not be advertised as exact runtime routing.

remaining_blockers: Find a source that confirms whether the chart-drawn SID route line is schematic or intended as exact geodetic geometry.
Reconcile YDM R067/D6.5, CJU R013/D30.0, and IPDAS projected positions with an exact route centerline authority.
Refine the page-space centerline candidates into exact chart centerlines after exact chart georeference.
Audit the exact D6.5 cut point on the shared R067 YDM initial route segment before treating the shared chart line as IPDAS-only geometry.
Cross-check the published turn shape from YDM R067/D6.5 to CJU R013 against the constructed D15 intercept training path.
Cross-check the R013 CJU/D30.0 to IPDAS segment against the chart linework, not only the radial/DME math.
Only after those checks pass may exact_runtime_route_allowed become true.
